CustomField.formula:
CASE( Subsidiary__c, "Parent Company : SimilarWeb Inc","16 East 34th Street, 15th Floor New York, NY 10016 United States", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Similarweb FR" ,"C/O Mazars France, 1 rue des Arquebusiers, 67000 Strasbourg, France ", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb IL","33 Yizhak Rabin Road, Givatayim, 5348303, Israel", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb AU", "Suite 2204, 520 Oxford St. Bondi Junction, NSW, Australia",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK : Similarweb FR"," C/O Mazars France 1 rue des Arquebusiers 67000 Strasbourg France",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb JP","# 465, 4th floor, Otemachi Building 6-1, Otemachi 1-chome, Chiyoda-ku, Tokyo 100-0004 Japan",
"Parent Company : SimilarWeb UK","Addleshaw Goddard - Milton Gate, 7th Floor, 60 Chiswell St, London EC1Y 4AG United Kingdom", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb DE","SimilarWeb Germany GmbH c/o Unicorn Workspaces, Kaufingerstraße 24, München, Germany, 80331", "Parent Company : SimilarWeb SGD","135 Cecil Street #10-01, 069536, Singapore", null )
CustomField.label: Subsidiary Address
